prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small blue rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small green metal sphere
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small red rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: small brown rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0104] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0105] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0108] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0120] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
